characters.name: A. B. Wynter
characters.description: A. B. WynterGeneral informationFull nameA. B. WynterGender♂ MaleStatusDeceasedCause of deathStruck on the head with a large clockPersonal informationOccupationChief usherResidenceThe White House, Washington D.C.EnemiesLilly SchumacherSeries/Movie informationSeriesThe ResidencePortrayed byGiancarlo EspositoA. B. Wynteris a character in the seriesThe Residence, portrayed byGiancarlo Esposito. A.B. is the chief usher at the White House. A.B. has worked at the White House for over 20 years, starting as an assistant usher. He has the decades of notes on the comings and goings of the residence. A.B. is murdered in the White House. A.B. values conventions over almost everything.

characters.description: Aarav RavGeneral informationFull nameAarav RavAlso known asChampGender♂ MalePersonal informationFamilyNeysa(mother)Saju Rav† (father)Series/Movie informationFeature Films(s)ExtractionPortrayed byPallas PrajapatiAarav Ravis a character in the movieExtraction. He is portrayed byPallas Prajapati. He is the son ofSaju RavandNeysa. At an unknown point in time, Aarav was born to his parentsSaju RavandNeysa, who raised him along with their housemaidSadia. While his father was in a meeting withOvi Mahajan Sr.in prison, Mahajan threatened Aarav's life, saying that he wouldn't see his next birthday if Rav did not retrieve Mahajan'sson.

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: AaronGeneral informationFull nameAaronGender♂ MalePersonal informationOccupationDocumentary filmmakerSeries/Movie informationSeriesLuckiest Girl AlivePortrayed byDalmar AbuzeidAaronis a character onLuckiest Girl Alive. He is portrayed byDalmar Abuzeid. Aaron is a documentary filmmaker who inadvertently upturnsAni FaNelli's carefully ordered life, after he invites to share her side of the story of a traumatic incident that happened at her school, The bradley, when she was a teenager.

characters.name: Aaron Mitchell
characters.description: Aaron MitchellGeneral informationFull nameAaron Timothy MitchellGender♂ MaleSpeciesHumanAge10StatusAlivePersonal informationOccupationElementary school studentResidenceKentwood, MichiganFamilyRick Mitchell(father)Linda Mitchell(mother)Katie Mitchell(older sister)Eric(adoptive brother)FriendsAbbey PoseyRomance(s)Abbey PoseyPet(s)Monchi(dog)EnemiesPAL, PAL MAX, PAL MAX PrimeSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)The Mitchells vs. The MachinesVoiced byMichael RiandaAaron MitchellisKatie’s 8-year-old younger brother. He is the son ofRickandLinda Mitchell.[1] Eric(adoptive brother) He can be very shy at times, as seen when he sees his crush Abbey. Aaron is also sad and insecure aboutKatieleaving for college and him being on his own. He has lack of social issues when meeting Abbey. In the dino store, while looking upset as the dinosaurs looked unreal, Abbey came through and the moment she came, he fell in love with her. While Abbey trying to communicate with him, he was nervous. "I hate dinosaurs and I hate you!" and  "Forever Bye" are the words he said before hitting into the wall and running away. He can be very shy at times, as seen when he sees his crush Abbey. Aaron is also sad and insecure aboutKatieleaving for college and him being on his own. He has lack of social issues when meeting Abbey. In the dino store, while looking upset as the dinosaurs looked unreal, Abbey came through and the moment she came, he fell in love with her. While Abbey trying to communicate with him, he was nervous. "I hate dinosaurs and I hate you!" and  "Forever Bye" are the words he said before hitting into the wall and running away.

characters.name: Aaron Quinn
characters.description: Aaron QuinnGeneral informationFull nameAaron QuinnGender♂ MalePersonal informationOccupationPhysical therapistFamilyJoe Quinn (father)Marianne Quinn (mother)Olivia (daughter)Naomi (daughter)Mike Huskins (father-in-law)Jane Huskins (mother-in-law)Devin Huskins (brother-in-law)Romance(s)Denise Huskins(girlfriend, now wife)Andrea Roberts (ex-fiancée)Series/Movie informationSeriesAmerican NightmarePortrayed byHimselfAaron Quinnis a person featured in the documentary seriesAmerican Nightmare. Aaron and his then-girlfriend,Denise Huskins, were victims of a home invasion and kidnapping, that was labelled as a hoax by police. Aaron andDenise Huskinsmet in 2014, in the Bay Area city of Vallejo, California, while working as physical therapists at a local hospital. On March 23, 2015, the couple were startled around 3 a.m. by a flashing white light, red laser dots, and what seemed to be a group of intruders wearing wet suits. Aaron reported the home invasion and kidnapping to the police, who deemed it to be a hoax.

characters.name: Abbey Posey
characters.description: Abbey PoseyGeneral informationFull nameAbigail Glinda PoseyGender♀ FemaleSpeciesHumanAge10-11StatusAlivePersonal informationFamilyJim Posey(father)Hailey Posey(mother)FriendsAaron MitchellPet(s)Unnamed DogEnemiesPAL MAX robotsSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)The Mitchells vs. The MachinesVoiced byCharlyne YiAbbey Poseyis the daughter ofJimandHailey Posey, as well as the love interest ofAaron Mitchell. To Be Added Abbey is a young girl with tan skin and dark brown hair cut into bangs held by a brown barrette. She also wears round, brown and teal glasses. She wears a light gray shirt saying "I ❤️ NZ" with a blue kiwibird, and wears a brown bracelet on her left arm, blue shorts, and gray socks with white sandals. To Be Added

characters.name: Abbi Singh
characters.description: Abbi SinghGeneral informationFull nameAbbi SinghAlso known asThe SuccubusJill Nye the Science Guy (by Tilda)Gender♀ FemaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownPersonal informationOccupationUndergraduate studentGeneticistFriendsTilda WeberJuan RuizRomance(s)Hannah MooreSeries/Movie informationSeriesThe ImperfectsFirst appearanceSarkov's ChildrenLast appearanceDestroy All MonstersPortrayed byRhianna JagpalAbbi Singhis a character onThe Imperfects. She is portrayed byRhianna Jagpal. Abbi is a reserved undergrad who aspires to be a scientist. She develops abilities that give her a Succubus-like control over anyone around her. Her genetic makeup gives her hyperactive pheromones, which causes her to inadvertently arouse people. She struggles to deal with others wildly attracted by her suddenly super-potent pheromones while balancing her career. She hopes to study biogenetics at Oxford University and desperately wants to get her condition under control. She is prepared to take on any obstacles in her way. Abbi Singh,Tilda WeberandJuan Ruizare three young adults suffering from the side effects by the DNA experiment byDr. Alex SarkovandDr. Sydney Burke. The three team up and demand answers fromDr. Sydney BurkeandDr. Alex Sarkov.

characters.name: Abby Gladwell
characters.description: Abby GladwellGeneral informationFull nameAbby GladwellGender♀ FemalePersonal informationOccupationInterpol agentSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)LiftPortrayed byGugu Mbatha-RawAbby Gladwellis a character in the action comedy movieLift, who is portrayed byGugu Mbatha-Raw. Abby is an Interpol agent. She is reluctant to recruitCyrus Whitakerfor a high-stakes mission to stop the gold from falling into the hands of global terror. However, her bossDennis Huxleyconvinces Abby to give Cyrus and his team a chance.

characters.name: Adam Franco
characters.description: Adam FrancoGeneral informationFull nameAdam FrancoGender♂ MalePersonal informationOccupationSpecial-ops agentEnemiesVictor PastoreSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)AKAPortrayed byAlban LenoirAdam Francois a character in the French crime action movieAKA. He is portrayed by Alban Lenoir. Adam is a resilient, effective and ruthless special-ops agent who has 20 years of experience. He is known for killing a sexual predator at age 15. Adam's latest assignment is to infiltrate a new criminal enterprise run by the notorious crime boss,Victor Pastore. After Adam gains his trust, Victor enlists him as a bodyguard for his son, Jonathan.

characters.name: Adam Lawrence
characters.description: Adam LawrenceGeneral informationFull nameAdam LawrenceAlso known asMr. Mysterious (by Maddy)CChiefGender♂ MaleStatusDeceasedCause of deathShot byDede AlexanderPersonal informationOccupationDeputy Chief of MI6Interim Chief of MI6FamilyCallum Lawrence(son)Ella Lawrence(daughter)FriendsMartin Angelis(formerly)Dede Alexander(formerly)Patrick HamiltonKara YusovaRomance(s)Maddy De Costa(wife)Kara Yusova(ex-lover)Sián Lawrence† (ex-wife)EnemiesDede AlexanderMartin AngelisSeries/Movie informationSeriesTreasonPortrayed byCharlie CoxAdam Lawrenceis a character onTreason. He is portrayed byCharlie Cox. Adam is the Deputy Chief of MI6, following a highly successful career as a field agent. Most notably, having thwarted an attack on the British embassy in Baku, Azerbaijan. When the MI6 chief, SirMartin Angelis, is poisoned, Adam becomes interim chief.  However, with the reappearance of an old flame,Kara Yusova, he soon realizes his success may have been organized by somebody with ulterior motives.

characters.description: Adrian LovellGeneral informationFull nameAdrian LovellGender♂ MalePersonal informationOccupationArms dealerMarine (formerly)FriendsHector ÁlvarezRomance(s)The Mother(formerly)EnemiesThe MotherWilliam CruiseZoeSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)The MotherPortrayed byJoseph FiennesAdrian Lovellis a character in the drama action movieThe Mother. He is portrayed byJoseph Fiennes. Adrian is an ex-marine and arms dealer. He wasthe Mother's military mentor. He andHector Álvarezare business partners in a criminal network and were both romantically involved with the Mother. When the Mother learned of the darker side of their business, she ratted them out to FBI agentWilliam Cruise, setting Hector and Adrian on a quest to get revenge against the Mother. Hector and Adrian plan to kidnap her daughterZoeto force the Mother out of hiding.

characters.name: Agent Green
characters.description: Agent GreenGeneral informationFull nameAgent GreenGender♀ FemaleAge160 years oldPersonal informationOccupationDream copSeries/Movie informationFeature Films(s)SlumberlandPortrayed byWeruche OpiaAgent Greenis a character onSlumberland. She is portrayed byWeruche Opia. Agent Green is a dream cop. She is after the secret map that helps guideFlipandNemothrough Slumberland. She will do anything to get it, even if it means freezing them in Slumberland forever.

characters.name: Aida Kurt
characters.description: Aida KurtGeneral informationFull nameAida KurtGender♀ FemalePersonal informationOccupationPolice officerResidenceAachen, GermanyFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed childrenRomance(s)SalliSeries/Movie informationSeriesDear ChildPortrayed byHaley Louise JonesAida Kurtis a character in the German psychological thriller miniseriesDear Child, who is portrayed byHaley Louise Jones. Aida is a police officer who is in charge of investigating the hit-and-run case and kidnapping ofLena Beck. Aida works withInes Reisig. After the hit-and-run, Aida arrived at the University Hospital Aachen, where she met the woman and a young girl namedHannah. She was also met byGerd Bühling, the CID officer who was in charge of the Lena Beck missing persons case 13 years ago.

characters.name: Akbar Mohammed
characters.description: Akbar MohammedGeneral informationFull nameAkbar MohammedAlso known asAkGender♂ MalePersonal informationOccupationArchitectFamilyAmira Mohammed(daughter)Omar Mohammed(son)Ezra Cohen(son-in-law)Romance(s)Fatima Mohammed(wife)Series/Movie informationFeature Films(s)You PeoplePortrayed byEddie MurphyAkbar Mohammed, born Woody Mohammed, is a character in the movieYou People. He is portrayed byEddie Murphy. Akbar isAmira Mohammed's stern father, who takes his Muslim faith seriously. He works hard as an architect. Like his wife,Fatima Mohammed, he has reservations about his daughter marrying into a Jewish family.
